text:
Sponsor focus: Bitcoin Treasuries Unconference UK.

We are pleased to have support from Africa Bitcoin Corporation for this event.

Africa Bitcoin Corporation is a Bitcoin Backed, SME Growth Accelerator. They accumulate Bitcoin in their treasury and use this Bitcoin as collateral to access cheap funding across the globe. This in turn allows them to offer growth capital at affordable rates to SME’s in Africa who face exorbitant costs of capital.

We are pleased to have them supporting the conversation around Bitcoin as digital capital.

Join us in Bristol, UK. Real conversations. Real strategies. Real builders.

Hosted by The Smarter Web Company × Bitcoin Treasuries Media on 29 May 2026. Secure your ticket today (link in comments).

We are pleased to have support from @Tennyson_Secs  for this event.
